baseline.relationship: branch is one commit ahead at refresh time

function_catalog_scope: recipe loading, base-recipe overlay, and user-decision input
source-aware authored recipe and user-decision field closure before config or workspace mutation
consultation decisions and task-specific policy gates
read-only recipe evaluation and no-write plan preflight
variant-aware command rendering and frozen plan generation
canonical experiment workspace identity and lifecycle state
local and SSH managed-artifact I/O and topology validation
frozen hparam plan, runtime manifest, PID, log, checkpoint, and progress evidence

hparam target identity freezing, repository-owned module origins, normalized execution snapshots, same-wrapper pre-start identity and artifact guards, cross-plan capacity refresh, explicit queue draining, monitoring, stopping, selection, and postprocessing
experiment W&B sync, checkpoint indexing, monitoring, ranking, and finalization
adaptive hparam rounds with round-zero Python/commit identity and later source-controlled operational execution fields
config, index, preset, repository, and skill summaries
workflow_scope: base/local/effective recipe closure and zero-side-effect failure
recipe preflight and command plan generation

managed hparam planning with canonical-local identity defaults and explicit non-manager identity, module-origin-bound target snapshots, same-wrapper pre-start verification, cross-plan capacity refresh, full-queue execution, monitoring, stop, selection, and external evaluation
managed experiment initialization, step registration, tracking, ranking, and finalization
adaptive hparam initialization, one-time round-zero execution identity freezing, and round progression with mutable operational settings
sleep2stat recipe routing through the existing sleep2stat CLI

exclusions: Product model, data, preprocessing, variant, and sleep2stat internals are context-only in this narrowed index
AGENTS.md is referenced for ownership policy but is not duplicated
Generated recipes, workspaces, W&B state, remote state, caches, and ignored artifacts are not sources of truth
sleep2vec_moe and sleep2vec_hires have no tracked files on this branch
